import { DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES } from "/src/app/data/taxonomy.ts";
const samplePolicyContent = `POLICY DOCUMENT

1. PURPOSE AND SCOPE
This policy establishes the framework and procedures for [policy area]. It applies to all staff members, contractors, and volunteers working within the organization.

2. POLICY STATEMENT
The organization is committed to maintaining the highest standards of [policy area] in accordance with relevant legislation, regulations, and industry best practices.

3. RESPONSIBILITIES
3.1 Management shall:
   • Ensure implementation of this policy
   • Provide adequate resources and training
   • Monitor compliance and effectiveness
   • Review and update policy annually

3.2 Staff shall:
   • Comply with all policy requirements
   • Report any concerns or incidents
   • Complete required training
   • Maintain confidentiality

4. PROCEDURES
4.1 Implementation Process
   • Initial assessment and planning
   • Resource allocation
   • Training delivery
   • Ongoing monitoring

4.2 Compliance Requirements
   • Regular audits and inspections
   • Documentation and record-keeping
   • Incident reporting
   • Continuous improvement

5. RELATED DOCUMENTS
   • Associated procedures
   • Forms and templates
   • Legislative requirements
   • Industry standards

6. REVIEW AND UPDATES
This policy will be reviewed annually or as required by changes in legislation, regulations, or organizational needs.

Document Control:
Last Reviewed: March 2025
Next Review Due: March 2026
Approved By: Executive Management
Version: 2.1`;
export const mockDocuments = [
  {
    id: "doc-1",
    title: "Fire Safety Protocol",
    type: "Policy",
    category: "ops",
    version: "2.1",
    content: samplePolicyContent.replace("[policy area]", "fire safety and emergency response"),
    status: "published",
    author: "Platform Admin",
    lastModified: "2025-03-28",
    requiresAcknowledgement: true,

    status: "published",

    tags: ["Safety", "Manual Handling", "WHS"],
    userStatus: "unread",
    documentType: "policy",
    careType: "Aged Care"
  }
];
export const documentsByCategory = DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES.reduce((acc, cat) => {
  acc[cat.value] = mockDocuments.filter((d) => d.category === cat.value);
  return acc;
}, {});
export const getDocumentsByCategoryLabel = (categoryValue) => {
  return documentsByCategory[categoryValue] || [];
};
export const popularDocuments = [
  mockDocuments[0]
  // Fire Safety Protocol
];
export const quickLinkDocuments = {
  emergency: [mockDocuments[0]],
  // Fire Safety
  hr: [],
  // No HR documents in this mock
  clinical: []
  // No clinical documents in this mock
};
export const mockUserOrganization = {
  id: "org-1",
  name: "Example Care Services",
  sectors: ["Aged Care"]
  // Change to ['NDIS'] or ['Aged Care', 'NDIS'] to test different scenarios
};
export const mockStaffAccessTracking = [
  { documentId: "doc-3", lastAccessedAt: "2025-04-16T09:30:00Z", accessCount: 15 },
  // Code of Conduct - most used
  { documentId: "doc-6", lastAccessedAt: "2025-04-16T08:45:00Z", accessCount: 12 },
  // Privacy Policy
  { documentId: "doc-1", lastAccessedAt: "2025-04-15T16:20:00Z", accessCount: 8 },
  // Fire Safety
  { documentId: "doc-2", lastAccessedAt: "2025-04-15T14:10:00Z", accessCount: 7 },
  // Emergency Evacuation
  { documentId: "doc-4", lastAccessedAt: "2025-04-14T11:00:00Z", accessCount: 10 }
  // Medication Guidelines
];
export function getDocumentsWithTracking(docs, tracking) {
  return docs.map((doc) => {
    const trackingData = tracking.find((t) => t.documentId === doc.id);
    return {
      ...doc,
      lastAccessedAt: trackingData?.lastAccessedAt,
      accessCount: trackingData?.accessCount || 0
    };
  });
}
export function filterDocumentsBySector(docs, organizationSectors) {
  return docs.filter((doc) => {
    if (!doc.careType) return true;
    if (doc.careType === "All Services") return true;
    return organizationSectors.some(
      (sector) => doc.careType?.toLowerCase().includes(sector.toLowerCase())
    );
  });
}

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
